calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Xung Ha and Yu Lan Chen were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minor, Mei Qiong He.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Shuna Lei was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Sarah He.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
